EasySaveDocs
Table of Contents

Class LanguageService

Namespace
ProjetEasySave.ViewModel
Assembly
EasySaveWPF.dll

Provides internationalization and translation services for the EasySave application. This class implements the Singleton pattern to ensure a single, thread-safe instance manages all translations.

public class LanguageService
Inheritance
object
LanguageService

object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Methods

getInstance()

Retrieves the thread-safe singleton instance of the LanguageService.

public static LanguageService getInstance()

Returns

LanguageService

The single active instance of the translation service.

getLanguage()

Retrieves the currently active language code.

public string getLanguage()

Returns

string

A string representing the current language code.

setLanguage(string)

Changes the current application language if the specified language code exists in the loaded translation dictionary. It also updates the persistent configuration file with the new selection.

public void setLanguage(string languageCode)

Parameters

languageCode string

The new language code to apply (e.g., "en", "fr").

translate(string)

Translates a given key into the currently selected language.

public string translate(string key)

Parameters

key string

The string key corresponding to the desired text.

Returns

string

The translated string. If the key or translation is not found, the original key is returned as a fallback.
